active.note: Boundary C is in Fix-7. The human-operated Codex attempt returned schema-valid REWORK with three P1 and two P3 findings on the fixed fingerprint, but its rollout proves actual gpt-5.6-sol plus danger-full-access rather than the committed gpt-5.5 read-only command, so it is non-accepting as a formal Review-2 gate. The three P1 safety gaps were independently reproduced fake-only and are routed verbatim to the original zhipu_glm implementer through task-C-review-2-fix-7.prompt.md. Formal rework_count remains 1. No push, deployment, credential access, real Binance request, live-borrow start, Boundary C-to-main merge, or Boundary C acceptance is authorized.

note: Fixed-path active-stage pointer. A new session reads this first to locate the active stage in one hop, without scanning reports/agent-runs/. When a stage starts, the bookkeeper sets active to {stage_id, phase, handoff, updated_at}; when the stage is accepted/merged/abandoned, active returns to null and last_completed is updated.
